titleStmt.title: SII 34.408: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 408. Aruppukkōṭṭai, Aruppukkottai Taluk, Ramanathapuram District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Sundarēśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Māṟavarman Sundarapāṇḍya I, 13+1st, Dhanus, sudi 3, Wednesday, Śravaṇa = (taking the year as 3+1) A.D. 1219, December 11.

Gift of some land as tax-free dēvadāna for offerings in a service called Ulaganārāyaṇaṉ-sandhi by Aḻagaṉ Aruḷāḷapperumāḷ alias Ulaganārāyaṇaṉa-chakkaravatti hailing from Perunāṅgūr in Chāṇāḍu in Madurōdaya-vaḷanāḍu. Detailed description of the boundaries of the land is given.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiruvāykkEḻvikki mEl
ṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakka
cōṇāṭu koṇṭu muṭikoṇṭa cōḻapurattu vīrar A
bhiṣEkam paṇṇiyaruḷiya śrīsundarapāṇḍyadevaṟku yāṇṭu 13 vatiṉ
Etirāmāṇṭu dhanu nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣa titiyaiyum puta
ṉ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvōṇattu nāḷ maturōtaiya
vaḷa nāṭṭu cāṇāṭṭup perunāṅkūr Aḻakaṉ Aruḷāḷaṉ
Ulakanārāyaṇaṉ canti celvatāka kuṭutta nilamāvatu Iṭattuvaḷi
peṟṟāṉ
paralōka kaṇṭaya pērēriyil
luviḷaiyum nilam Iraṇṭumā mukkāṇikku cūḻellaikkuk kīḻellai Ula
ka maṇṭala nāṭāḻ paṟṟukku mēṟkum teṉṉellai maṉukula tēvip pē
raiyaṉ paṉaiyōṭu ceykku vaṭakkum mēlellai kō kaṉ piraḷai ceykku
m Arivīrakaṇṭap pēraiya ceykkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai vikkirama
pāṇṭiya
teṟkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilam kiṇaṟu
mēṟpaṭiyāṟ cūriyaṉ peṟṟāṉ pakkal vilai koṇṭa nilattukkuc cūḻe
llaikkuk kīḻellai peruntuvaḷi nāṭāḻvāṉ vaya
lukku mēṟkum teṉellai Ulakamalai nāṭāḻvāṉ vaya
lukkum nikarili cōḻappēraiyaṉ vayalukku vaṭakkum mēlellai teṉṉa
vaṉ muttaṉaraṅkaṉukkuc cītaṉaṅkuṭutta vayalukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai cī
vala nāṭāḻvāṉukkut teṟkumivvicainta perunāṉkellaik kuḷpaṭṭa
nilamu mivvulaka nārāyaṇaṉ cantikku Amutu paṭiyuḷḷiṭṭa vēṇṭuvaṉava
yiṟṟukku Innilattāl vanta kārāṇmai mīyāṭci kaṭamai Antarāyam ma
ṟṟu meppēṟpaṭṭaṉavum Iṟaiyili tēvatāṉamāka Ippaṭi cantirātittava
ṟ celvatākak kalveṭṭuvittukkuṭuttēṉ Aḻakaṉaruḷāḷap perumāḷā
ṉa Ulaka nārāyaṇac cakkiravattiyēṉ Uṭaiyār kuṟaḷ māṇīśvaramuṭaiyaṉā
yaṉāṟku Ippaṭik kuṭutta Aḻakaṉaruḷāḷapperumāḷāṉa Ulakanārāyaṇa
ccakkaravatti Eḻuttu pūṅkālanāṭṭuk karaiyirukkai narapati vāḻaiyūrā
ṉa naralōka cuntaranallūr peṟṟāṉ peṟṟāṉāṉa tamiḻanāṭṭaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu
toṇṭai nāṭṭu Oṇamaṅkaikiḻār matiraiyaḻakaṉ vaṭukaṉṉāṉa
tamiḻap pallavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 34.408 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
